response.step_by_step_log: Identified 'Anagura Gurashi' from on-screen text at 00:00, and 'Kororon' from text at 04:10. Searched for 'Anagura Gurashi Kikuo Japanese and English lyrics' and 'Kororon Eve Japanese and English lyrics' to get full lyrics and translations. Used character names as performers from visual cues.
response.global_summary: The video features a medley of two Japanese songs. The first song, "Anagura Gurashi" (Hole Dwelling), is performed by Ouro Kronii. The second song, "Kororon" (Tiger's and Wolves are Coming), is performed by Ouro Kronii and Nanashi Mumei.

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii sings 'Anagura Gurashi', with the title appearing in the top left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
せまいせまい穴ぼこで
夢を見せあう僕たちは
あの世もこの世もいられない
...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Inside a cramped, narrow hole
The two of us show each other our dreams
We can't be in this world, or the next
...

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii and Nanashi Mumei perform 'Kororon', with title and artist credits in the middle.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
サンタマリア
起死回生の一打を放ってくれ
湿っぽいのはいらんな
爽快に派手にやって終い
...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Santa Maria, give us a miraculous comeback
We don't need anything damp
Let's do it brightly and refreshingly till the end
...
